ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Full name of the school */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the school is located */,
  "building_code" TEXT /* Building code for the school */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the school */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the school */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of school operations */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of school operations */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private, charter) */,
  "school_level" TEXT /* Level of school (e.g., elementary, middle, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_borough FOREIGN KEY ("borough") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_building_code FOREIGN KEY ("building_code") REFERENCES buildings ("building_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the enrollment record */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated school */,
  "student_enrollment" REAL /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "percent_white" REAL /* Percentage of white students */,
  "percent_black" REAL /* Percentage of black students */,
  "percent_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic students */,
  "percent_asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian students */,
  "percent_native_american" REAL /* Percentage of Native American students */,
  "percent_other" REAL /* Percentage of students from other ethnicities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for SAT score record */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated school */,
  "avg_sat_math" REAL /* Average SAT math score */,
  "avg_sat_reading" REAL /* Average SAT reading score */,
  "avg_sat_writing" REAL /* Average SAT writing score */,
  "percent_tested" REAL /* Percentage of students tested */,
  "avg_sat_total" REAL /* Average total SAT score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the building */,
  "building_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated school */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the school */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, teacher, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the school the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated school */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_programs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the facility */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated school */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_facilities_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the staff member */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated school */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_staff_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated school */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_events_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the budget */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated school */,
  "budget_year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated in the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_budgets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
